# AI Tools for Brand Monitoring in 2026

Protecting your brand reputation is crucial, but manually monitoring the entire internet is impossible. AI tools help you stay on top of what people are saying!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more AI tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]: Response Writing

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] helps you craft professional responses to brand mentions.

### Rytr for Brand Monitoring
- **Response templates**: Professional replies to reviews
- **Tone adjustment**: Match the situation's emotion
- **Crisis management**: Help navigate sensitive situations

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## Notion AI: Brand Reputation Tracking

Notion AI helps you organize and analyze brand mentions.

### Notion AI for Brand Monitoring
- **Mention tracking**: Log and organize brand mentions
- **Sentiment summaries**: Get AI analysis of opinions
- **Response repository**: Save effective replies

**Try Notion AI**: {{AFFILIATE_NOTION}}

---

## Step-by-Step Brand Monitoring

### 1. Set Up Alerts
Use free tools like Google Alerts to track mentions.

### 2. Analyze Sentiment
Use ChatGPT to analyze mention tone and sentiment.

### 3. Craft Responses
Use [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] to write professional replies.

### 4. Track & Improve
Use Notion AI to monitor trends over time.
